_comment: HARNESS-04 (ADR 0019 follow-up): mutation testing scoped to the security-critical BFF core. Q1b proves tests aren't WEAKENED; this proves they aren't HOLLOW — a surviving mutant is a behaviour change no test caught. Scoped to rbac/auth/approvals (scope enforcement + four-eyes) and DB-free (vitest.mutation.config.ts) so it runs fast and hermetically. `break` is calibrated below the measured baseline so a real regression fails CI without flaking on the noise floor.
